description: Mexican criminal organization that split from the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel in 2009, based in Guerrero and Morelos. Engages in drug trafficking, money laundering, extortion, robbery, murder, arms trafficking, prostitution, and kidnapping. Known for financing political candidates and violent territorial disputes with rival cartels.

country_links.evidence_quote: The group also has an important participation in drug trafficking to the United States .
country_links.context: The Los Rojos Cartel participates in drug trafficking to the United States.
